description_long: This is a large, bell-shaped ceramic vase with a wide flared rim and two prominent, curved handles on either side. The exterior is richly decorated with intricate red-figure artwork, featuring mythological scenes, possibly from ancient Greek culture, including a chariot and figures in classical attire. The rim and base are adorned with geometric and floral motifs, adding to the ornate appearance. The surface has a matte finish with a predominantly dark brown background and reddish-orange illustrations. The handles are robust and smoothly integrated into the body, providing both aesthetic and functional value. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding flowers or other decorative items.
description: A large, ornately decorated ceramic vase with mythological red-figure artwork, wide flared rim, and two curved handles. The surface features intricate patterns and classical motifs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main mythological scene with a chariot and figures, flanked by both handles.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the back of the vase with symmetrical decorative motifs and both handles visible from behind.
description_view_2: Similar to the front, this side view also displays the mythological artwork and both handles, but from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, focusing on the back motifs and the curvature of the handles.
